last_action: Implementation + baseline benchmarks with adaptive replications (50/30/10)
next_action: adversarial testing (Stage 3) -- malicious shares, timing attacks, colluding nodes

share_generation_us_per_element.note: JavaScript BigInt; production native will be ~10-50x faster

history.description: Comprehensive literature review: 24 references from production systems (StarkEx, Polygon CDK, Arbitrum Nova, EigenDA, Celestia) and academic papers (Semi-AVID-PR, SSS, BLS aggregation). Key finding: no production DAC provides data privacy.

Implemented Shamir SSS over BN128 field, DACNode, DACProtocol with ECDSA attestation and AnyTrust fallback. Ran benchmark suite (4 batch sizes x 2 configs + failure scenarios + scaling test). 51/51 privacy tests, 61/61 recovery tests. All hypothesis targets confirmed with 5.8x+ margins.
